## Summary

Describe the user-facing change and the reason for it.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run test:frontend`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Manual verification, when applicable

State any check you could not run and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and does not include unrelated refactors.
- [ ] Documentation is updated when setup or behavior changes.
- [ ] No API keys, tokens, private transcripts, or sensitive logs are included.
- [ ] ASR, LLM, and persisted-secret behavior is unchanged or explicitly covered by validation.
